```{r setup, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
require(sf)
require(spdep)
transit <- read.csv("transitcost.csv")
```

```{r spatial autocorrelation,  out.height="35%", message = FALSE,  warning = FALSE}

medcost <- transit %>% group_by(country) %>% summarize(median.cost = log(median(cost_km_millions, na.rm=T)))

colnames(medcost) <- c("ISO", "Median_Cost")

shp <- st_read("World_Countries_Generalized.shp")

medshp <- merge(shp, medcost)

well <- medshp %>% select(Median_Cost, geometry)

plot(well, main = "Median Cost of Transit Project per km (in millions of USD)")

centroid <- st_centroid(medshp)
dist <- knearneigh(centroid, k = 4)
dist_nb <- knn2nb(dist)
medshp_wts <- nb2listw(dist_nb, style = "W")

plot(st_geometry(medshp), reset = FALSE)
plot(dist_nb, coords = st_coordinates(centroid), add = TRUE, col = "red")

# Moran Scatterplot

moran.plot(as.numeric(scale(medshp$Median_Cost)), listw=medshp_wts, 
           xlab="Standardized Transit Project Cost", 
           ylab="Standardized Lagged Project Cost",
           main=c("Moran Scatterplot for Transit Costs") )

    
moran.test(medshp$Median_Cost, medshp_wts)    

moran.mc(medshp$Median_Cost, medshp_wts, nsim = 999)


```
